name: Schwab Option Chain Test
description: Test case for retrieving the Schwab option chain for a symbol through agent interaction

parts.text: Show me the Schwab option chain for Apple (AAPL).

I attempted to retrieve the Schwab option chain for Apple (AAPL). The option chain includes available call and put contracts across multiple expiration dates and strike prices. Note that Schwab authentication is required to access live option chain data.
